Sigma_multiplicities_for_APN_functions_in_dimension_8_3 https://boolean.wiki.uib.no/Sigma_multiplicities_for_APN_functions_in_dimension_8_3 This is a continuation of the computational data described in $href="Sigma_multiplicities_for_APN_functions_in_dimension_8",text="Sigma multiplicities for APN functions in dimension 8" and continued in $href="Sigma_multiplicities_for_APN_functions_in_dimension_8_2",text="Sigma multiplicities for APN functions in dimension 8 2" . The table below lists the partition sizes for the second half of the APN functions over GF(2^8); the first half is given in $href="Sigma_multiplicities_for_APN_functions_in_dimension_8_2",text="Sigma multiplicities for APN functions in dimension 8 2" .
